en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 37

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 37
With the Web3 Patrons live, what does that mean?

Well, in case it wasn’t obvious, this is a massive next step for Web3 Fashion. Now, every single designer is becoming their own platform, their own label and their own self sovereign ecosystem that is highly interconnected with the rest of the metaverse.
No designer needs to be held back by any single point of failure or centralised chokepoint.

A designer realm is a slice of this metaverse, and with web3 value based network effects the indie Web3 Fashion Fleet is able to enter the scale up phase enabling hyper growth for the entire web3 fashion industry across 1000’s of the next great brands, labels, and markets.

The Patrons platform will continue to evolve overtime to include more and more designer realms and also integrate with advanced collector and analytic tooling, making buying into the heart of web3 fashion so much easier.
Start championing your favourite indie brands as they continue to redefine style through web3.
What are the complements in web3 fashion?
There are 4 core areas, amongst others;

These are the primary ways that major segments of the broader market modify, enhance, showcase, discover, and experience fashion. It’s no different in kind in web3 fashion, although as with most things, far more powerful.

Incorporating these complements into the heart of every layer of what we are building, and reducing their costs and stress points by increasing the ease of flow and interaction with every stage of the web3 fashion experience, accelerates and ignites an entirely new expansion of this metaverse pioneering industry.

If you are accepting over $100m, it is best to disclose really key things around IP and ownership before the mint starts. Opaqueness around ownership and misalignment with the interests of your collectors is pure ngmi. Why pretend that you care about web3 at all?
Zuck gets completely owned by Neo about the metaverse. See the full take below 👇
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
